name: ipsecAssociationDatabaseGetSpi
title: ipsecAssociationDatabaseGetSpi
syntax: long ipsecAssociationDatabaseGetSpi(IP_Endpoint source, IP_Endpoint destination, char[] protocol, char[] mode);
description: With this function it is possible to create a security association in the security association database of the current network stack. The stack will assign a free SPI to the security association. After the creation it is possible to modify the security association record with ipsecAssociationSetParameter and the update the security association in the database by calling ipsecAssociationDatabaseUpdate.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Source endpoint of the security association.

parameters.name: destination
parameters.description: Destination endpoint of the security association.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
